Package neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.twophasepipe.validation

Class TwoFluidBenchmarkHarness

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.twophasepipe.validation.TwoFluidBenchmarkHarness
public final class TwoFluidBenchmarkHarness extends Object
Benchmark comparison harness for TwoFluidPipe profiles against external simulator or field data.

The expected CSV columns are: case,time_s,position_m,variable,value,abs_tolerance,rel_tolerance,source. This intentionally uses a simple numeric export format that can be produced from OLGA, LedaFlow, field historians, or spreadsheet post-processing.
